Located near the picturesque Jakkur Lake, this ready-to-move residence offers a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and modern lifestyle amenities. Situated on the 7th floor of a 12-storey tower, the apartment enjoys excellent natural light, ventilation, and pleasant views, making it an ideal choice for families, professionals, and investors.::::Property Specifications::::Spread across a carpet area of 950 sq. ft and a super built-up area of 1005 sq. ft, this thoughtfully designed apartment provides a functional and comfortable living environment. The home features two spacious bedrooms, two well-appointed bathrooms, and two balconies that allow fresh air and natural light to flow throughout the residence. The combined living and dining area creates an open and welcoming atmosphere suitable for both everyday living and entertaining guests. The apartment includes a kitchen with piped gas connectivity, while vitrified flooring enhances the overall appearance and ensures easy maintenance. The property is Vastu compliant and enjoys a favourable west-facing orientation. Being an unfurnished unit, it offers complete flexibility to customise the interiors according to personal preferences and lifestyle requirements. The apartment also includes one covered parking space for added convenience.::::Facilities::::Residents of Adarsh Greens enjoy access to a wide range of modern amenities designed to enhance everyday living. The project also features a children's play pool with water slides along with numerous lifestyle and recreational amenities that cater to all age groups. Two lifts provide convenient access to all floors, while the well-maintained community ensures a comfortable and secure living environment.::::Locality::::Kogilu is one of North Bangalore's rapidly developing residential destinations, offering excellent connectivity to major business hubs, educational institutions, and lifestyle centres. The property is conveniently located near Jakkur Lake and enjoys easy access to schools and hospitals within approximately 4 km. Markets and daily convenience stores are available within 500 metres, while public transportation options are easily accessible. The railway station is around 8 km away, and major road networks ensure smooth connectivity to key areas of Bangalore. With its strategic location, modern amenities, and quality construction by Adarsh Group, this apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a home in one of Bangalore's promising residential neighbourhoods.

resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsA beautifully designed 2 BHK apartment is available for sale in Nikoo Homes IV, a premium residential development located on Thanisandra Main Road, Bangalore. Situated within the vibrant Bhartiya City township, this ready to move property offers a perfect blend of modern living, convenience, and lifestyle amenities. With a super built up area of 1159 sq ft and a resale price of Rs 1.55 Crore, this apartment is an excellent choice for families, working professionals, and investors seeking a home in one of North Bangalores most sought after residential destinations.Property SpecificationsThe apartment comprises two spacious bedrooms, two well appointed bathrooms, and two balconies that provide ample natural light and ventilation. Located on the 17th floor of a 32 storey tower, the home enjoys elevated views and a peaceful living environment. The apartment is semi furnished, allowing buyers to move in comfortably while retaining flexibility for personalized interiors. The residence faces east, a preferred orientation among many homebuyers. The property comes with one covered parking space and features ceramic tile flooring that offers durability and easy maintenance. Three lifts serve the tower, ensuring convenient access for residents.FacilityResidents of Nikoo Homes IV enjoy access to a wide range of lifestyle and recreational amenities designed to enhance everyday living. The project offers visitor parking, a stylish bar and lounge area, jogging and strolling tracks, outdoor tennis courts, and service or goods lifts for added convenience. The well planned township environment provides a secure and community oriented lifestyle with landscaped surroundings and modern infrastructure. Dedicated covered parking and efficient building management further contribute to a comfortable residential experience.LocalityStrategically located on Thanisandra Main Road, the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity to key commercial hubs, educational institutions, healthcare centers, and entertainment destinations across Bangalore. The property is situated close to the landmark Bhartiya City Mall, offering residents convenient access to shopping, dining, and leisure options. The area is well connected to Manyata Tech Park, Hebbal, Kempegowda International Airport, and other major business districts. With its strong infrastructure growth, premium township setting, and proximity to essential conveniences, this apartment presents a valuable opportunity for both end users and investors.
